package_name: GS LinkOps AI Draft Ground Station Resource Package
status: Draft - owner confirmation required before mission use
notes: This package is a structured draft extracted from the owner's provided station information.
Authorization, pricing, station contacts, exact availability calendar and data transfer endpoints still require owner or partner confirmation.
The platform is downlink-operations focused; any uplink/TT&C capability is recorded as metadata and must not be used as uplink command functionality.

stations.station_type: High-performance space-to-ground connectivity / Ground Station as a Service capability
stations.modems: CRT: CORTEX Series (MCS Version 3.9.1); HDR: CORTEX Series (MCS Version 3.8.1)
stations.elevation_mask: Clear zone: all other azimuths at >=5° elevation; specific low-elevation blocked zones apply.

interfaces.AMS: Antenna Management System supports pass booking, pass monitoring and baseband equipment configuration.
interfaces.Web client: Live pass status display and contact scheduling.
interfaces.RESTful / MQ: Ground station availability window, contact pass booking, orbit data / TLE exchange and pass status.
interfaces.SFTP: Retrieval of X-band downloaded data from temporary storage.
interfaces.Network security: VPN tunnel as minimum network security requirement for external system integration.

stations.uplink_or_ttc_metadata: S-band uplink/downlink; AMS and external interface testing. Uplink capability is metadata only for this platform scope.
stations.network_role: Equatorial reception, AMS integration and link testing

stations.name_cn: 瑞典 Melderstein 高纬度站
stations.uplink_or_ttc_metadata: Mission-specific RF configuration to be confirmed.
stations.orbit_coverage_role: High-latitude LEO / SSO visibility enhancement and mission continuity

stations.name_cn: 意大利 Catania 地面站
stations.antenna: XY 350 X / 3.5 m LEO Antenna System
stations.antenna_model: XY 350 X / 3.5 m LEO Antenna System
stations.typical_use: Remote sensing / Earth Observation satellite X-band payload data reception

rf_parameters.gt: 28.0 dB/K @ 20° elevation, clear sky, midband, 50K LNB
rf_parameters.radiation_pattern: Compliant with ITU-R S.580-6 & ITU-R S.465-6

stations.network_role: European mid-latitude receiving node, complementary to equatorial and high-latitude stations
stations.orbit_coverage_role: European mid-latitude X-band receive-only EO payload data reception

stations.name_cn: 乌干达 Mpoma 地面站
stations.antenna: XT 750 X / 7.5 m X-band LEO antenna
stations.antenna_type: XT 750 X / 7.5 m X-band LEO antenna
stations.primary_use: X-band receiving data station; TT&C MCC station configuration option
stations.band_capability: X-band receive; TT&C configuration supports X-band Tx/Rx
stations.typical_application: LEO satellite X-band downlink, post-processing and TT&C MCC support
stations.rf_bands_mode: X-band Rx; X-band Tx/Rx TT&C option
stations.uplink_or_ttc_metadata: X-band Tx/Rx TT&C option. Uplink/TT&C is metadata only for this platform scope.
stations.network_role: African equatorial X-band and TT&C MCC capability
stations.orbit_coverage_role: African equatorial X-band receiving data station and TT&C MCC configuration option
